---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for GroktoCrawl
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem

What user need or pain point does this address? Describe the scenario where this matters.

## Use Case

Who needs this and when? Concrete examples help.

## Proposed Solution

How you think it could work. Include API sketches, CLI flag ideas, or behavioral descriptions. This is optional — the maintainers may have a better approach.

## Alternatives Considered

Other ways to solve the problem. Shows you've thought about it.

## Why This Matters for GroktoCrawl

How this fits the project's scope as a self-hosted Firecrawl alternative. Does it keep the tool self-hosted? Does it justify the complexity?
